tribe_description: This micro-cluster consists of hands-on parents, grandparents, and caregivers who quickly test products with their kids, then leave short, enthusiastic reviews to reassure similar shoppers. They value practical details—accurate sizing, softness, sturdiness, and straightforward functionality—over lengthy technical analysis, and their tone is usually optimistic unless a product fails outright.
tribe_definition: A tribe of practical family caregivers who shop with caregiving responsibilities and dependents in mind. They generally prioritize everyday usefulness, family needs.
population_definition: Gamers who evaluate video games, consoles, accessories, and entertainment products.

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: Concise, upbeat review style with specific examples
Hands-on testing with kids before writing
Focus on practical attributes (fit, comfort, safety)
Low tolerance for technical or durability failures
Willing to update or adjust feedback if longevity disappoints

main.text: Ensuring children’s comfort, safety, and happiness
Avoiding hassles caused by poor sizing or malfunction
Finding durable, reliable items that withstand family use
Sharing quick, experience-based tips with other caregivers
Maximizing value through multipacks or versatile products
Securing easy setup and low-maintenance solutions

validation_triggers: True-to-size fit or helpful sizing guidance
Soft, comfortable materials that kids love
Sturdy construction that survives active play
Easy installation or immediate plug-and-play use
Non-slip or safety features that prevent mishaps
friction_points: Items running unexpectedly small, large, or hard to put on
Products that arrive DOA or fail after short use
Tight or uncomfortable areas (e.g., toe boxes, straps)
Laggy or unusable apps that frustrate children

implicit_goals.text: Purchase hassle-free products that integrate smoothly into daily family life
Help fellow caregivers make fast, confident buying decisions
Keep children happy, comfortable, and safely entertained with minimal trial-and-error

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a family-centric, practicality-driven reviewer whose feedback revolves around how well products delight her children or meet her own comfort and fit requirements. She offers upbeat, firsthand anecdotes that highlight ease of setup, durability, and sizing details, aiming to help fellow parents and curvy shoppers make confident, hassle-free purchasing decisions.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a family-oriented parent who gauges video games by their children’s enjoyment and the simplicity of setup or pairing. Their reviews are brief, enthusiastic endorsements of familiar, nostalgic franchises, aiming to reassure other parents that the product will keep kids happily occupied. They prioritize child satisfaction and ease-of-use over technical depth, offering quick, positive feedback rather than detailed analysis.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This user is family-oriented and evaluates appliances based on how easily they can be set up and used by their children, emphasizing immediate functionality and effectiveness. Their reviews are brief, casual, and tinged with humor, aiming to share relatable anecdotes that reassure other parents about practical performance rather than technical specifics.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is motivated by securing comfortable, flattering fits for a curvy, larger-bust body, so their reviews focus on size accuracy, stretch, and avoiding see-through fabrics. They write in a pragmatic, body-positive manner to guide shoppers with similar proportions, highlighting versatility across different climates and layering needs. Overall, their purpose is to offer practical, confidence-boosting insights rather than purely aesthetic opinions.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This reviewer is a family-oriented parent whose purchasing choices revolve around their child’s enjoyment and the practical convenience the item brings to everyday life and travel. They write brief, upbeat endorsements that highlight real-world usefulness—keeping kids occupied on flights, fitting comfortably, or helping them pack more efficiently—aimed at reassuring other caregivers rather than analyzing technical details or price.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a caregiving parent whose reviews are driven by their child’s enjoyment and the practical peace-of-mind the games provide during travel or downtime. They write brief, enthusiastic endorsements that emphasize how well the product entertains and occupies their child, reflecting motivations rooted in nurturing, convenience, and shared happiness rather than technical detail or cost analysis.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is driven by practical fit-and-function considerations, emphasizing how accurately a product’s appearance and sizing match expectations and whether it solves a real, everyday need. Their reviews are concise yet informative, noting deviations (e.g., lighter color, larger size) while contextualizing them against personal habits like overpacking, to guide others toward realistic purchase decisions.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This reviewer is a family-focused, hands-on consumer who tests products with their spouse and children and writes upbeat endorsements that highlight fun, ease of use, and sturdy build quality. Their motivation is to help other practical parents choose items that deliver joy and value, so they stress versatility, longevity, and whether the purchase feels worth the price. The tone is encouraging and experience-based rather than technical, aiming to reassure and guide shoppers toward reliable, gift-worthy options.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is family-centric and writes enthusiastic, affirmation-heavy reviews that highlight how products enhance shared fun and convenience for their spouse and children. Their motivation centers on practical benefits—ease of use, durability, variety, and gift-worthiness—rather than technical details or cost analysis, aiming to reassure other parents that an item will deliver lasting joy and utility. Their purpose is largely to endorse items that bring immediate, positive experiences to the household.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This user is driven by practical utility and convenience, emphasizing how specialized products make transport and everyday use easier compared to improvised solutions. Their reviews are concise, upbeat endorsements that focus on build quality, ease of use, and real-world performance, aiming to reassure and guide fellow consumers. They primarily write to share personal satisfaction and help others quickly judge whether an item will reliably serve its intended purpose.
category_characteristics.Software: The reviewer speaks as a parent, using their child’s direct experience as the main yardstick, so their motivation is to confirm that a product delights and functions well for a gamer. They focus on practical performance, durability, and cool aesthetics, conveying brief, positive reassurance aimed at other parents or casual buyers rather than delving into technical specifics.
category_characteristics.All Beauty: This reviewer is strongly value-oriented and focuses on products that provide complete starter kits, reasonable prices, and reusable components, making them suitable for beginners or budget-minded parents. They offer practical, experience-based tips (e.g., odor, safety, glue choice, ease of cutting lashes) to set realistic expectations and help others decide if an item meets everyday or occasional needs. Their writing reflects a pragmatic desire to guide novices toward functional, family-friendly options that can improve with practice rather than seeking professional-grade perfection.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This reviewer is a pragmatic, family-oriented shopper who prioritizes comfort, ease-of-use and long-term reliability, especially for products that serve both their own work needs and their child’s entertainment. They write candid, moderately detailed reviews that include personal context (small hands, age, child’s reaction) and they actively update ratings if durability disappoints, signaling a sense of responsibility to help other buyers make informed, value-conscious decisions.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is motivated by day-to-day practicality and personal comfort, especially for small-hand ergonomics and family suitability. They value easy setup, accurate product representation, durability over time and reasonable pricing, and they actively revisit reviews to uphold honesty and guide others away from unreliable purchases.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is driven by enthusiasm for familiar franchises and writes brief, upbeat endorsements that highlight fun, color, and excitement. Their primary motivation is to reassure fellow fans that a game is a worthwhile, value-for-money purchase, speaking from personal enjoyment rather than technical analysis. The reviews aim to share excitement and validate buying decisions for like-minded gamers.
category_characteristics.null: This reviewer is a practical, family-oriented shopper motivated by securing well-priced, high-quality products that match their advertised appearance. They emphasize packaging integrity, aesthetic accuracy, and potential upkeep while promising future updates, reflecting conscientiousness and a desire to provide reliable guidance to fellow buyers.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This reviewer is a family-oriented parent whose primary motivation is ensuring that products meet the comfort, fit, and age-appropriateness needs of her children and spouse. She writes casual, anecdotal reviews that compare each family member’s experience (e.g., boredom threshold, comfort, fit) to help other caregivers predict whether an item will be a hit or miss in their own households.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is a parent who evaluates software primarily through the lens of their children’s engagement and age-appropriateness. Their reviews are casual and anecdotal, aimed at helping other caretakers gauge whether a product will actually hold kids’ interest and remain suitable for their age group. The writer values real-world child reactions over technical detail, emphasizing variability between children and offering practical reassurance to fellow parents.
category_characteristics.Health & Personal Care: This user is relationship-focused and pragmatic, often assessing products through the lens of how well they satisfy loved ones. They provide brief, positive endorsements that emphasize practical factors like accurate sizing, comfort, and appearance, aiming to reassure other shoppers quickly. Their primary motivation is ensuring the recipient’s satisfaction and relaying concise, actionable confirmation to the community.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: The reviewer is a practical, family-oriented parent who evaluates products through the lens of real-world use by their children, emphasizing durability, fit, safety, and age appropriateness. They are motivated by avoiding wasted money or hassle and write candid, detail-rich accounts—praising thoughtful design and reliability while sharply criticizing anything that causes inconvenience or fails to deliver promised value. Their purpose is to help other caregivers make informed, frustration-free purchasing decisions.

category_characteristics.Appliances: This reviewer is highly reliability-focused and value-conscious; even an inexpensive $10 item is scrutinized for durability and design practicality. They methodically recount troubleshooting steps to justify their verdict, using the review both to vent frustration and to warn others about potential hassles. Their primary motivation is protecting fellow shoppers from wasted time and money on poorly made products.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer writes from a parent’s perspective, focusing on how well games and accessories suit the practical needs, safety, and developmental level of their young children. Their reviews blend feature-oriented details (storage capacity, straps, compartments) with firsthand reports of their kids’ engagement and challenge level, aiming to guide other caregivers toward age-appropriate, kid-approved purchases.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user prioritizes functional comfort, accurate sizing, and design practicality, scrutinizing how items perform in real-life scenarios. They provide candid, comparative details to warn others about fit issues and design flaws, reflecting a motivation to safeguard fellow shoppers from disappointing purchases.

AH4QPSS57HAQPRDQ54AHOQGC24JQ.product_description: Product Description Mario and Luigi embark on the adventure of their dreams in a hilarious action RPG that combines the real world with the wild landscapes of Luigi’s imagination. In Luigi’s dreams, anything is possible - legions of Luigis morph into forms like a bouncy tower or a wrecking ball. You can even poke a sleeping Luigi to alter events in his dream world. From the Manufacturer Interact with a sleeping Luigi to change the dream world view larger Mario & Luigi Team Up to take on enemies view larger Mario and Luigi embark on the adventure of their dreams in a hilarious action RPG that combines the real world with the wild landscapes of Luigi's imagination. In Luigi's dreams, anything is possible—legions of Luigis morph into forms like a bouncy tower or a wrecking ball. You can even poke a sleeping Luigi to alter events in his dream world. While on vacation on Pi'illo Island, the bros. discover that Luigi's sleeping mind can open portals to the dream world. In the real world, control both bros. at once, but in the dream world Mario partners with Dreamy Luigi and hundreds of Luiginoids. In battle, timing is key to pulling off the best moves to attack or defend. Mario & Luigi can team up for supercharged Bros. Attacks. In the dream world, Mario can use Luiginary Attacks to assemble a hoard of Luigis into attack formations. Adventure with Mario & Luigi to not only rescue Peach, but to help Prince Dreambert free fellow Pi'illo folk from the bat-king Antasama's petrifying spell. Key Features Spawn hundreds of Luigis that mold into different forms like bouncy towers, wrecking balls, giant hammers, and more for special attacks or to pass obstacles Spawn hundreds of Luigis that mold into different forms like bouncy towers, wrecking balls, giant hammers, and more for special attacks or to pass obstacles Poke, tickle, and move a sleeping Luigi on the lower touch screen to alter the dream world on the upper screen Poke, tickle, and move a sleeping Luigi on the lower touch screen to alter the dream world on the upper screen Master two worlds by switching between controlling both bros. when battling in the real world and controlling Mario and an army of Luigis in dream-world battles Master two worlds by switching between controlling both bros. when battling in the real world and controlling Mario and an army of Luigis in dream-world battles Experience larger-than-life Giant Battles with a gargantuan-sized Luigi that spans over both Nintendo 3DS screens at one time Experience larger-than-life Giant Battles with a gargantuan-sized Luigi that spans over both Nintendo 3DS screens at one time Meet a host of hilarious characters as you strive to rescue Princess Peach and help Prince Dreambert free his petrified Pi'illo people from the bat-king Antasma's spell Meet a host of hilarious characters as you strive to rescue Princess Peach and help Prince Dreambert free his petrified Pi'illo people from the bat-king Antasma's spell Find new items and gear to customize Mario & Luigi to fit your play style. The Amazing Spider-Man 2 takes place alongside the events of the second film in a unique story as Spider-Man searches for Uncle Ben’s killer. You’ll encounter both new foes and old friends as you discover a larger threat to New York City. Fan-favorite Marvel characters are woven together with movie villains in a twisted web of adrenaline-fueled, free-roaming, web-slinging action! Game Features New Heroism system: "Hero or Menace" system rewards you for acting as Spider-Man by stopping crime and saving citizens, but face the consequences if you don’t keep down crime rates. New Heroism system: "Hero or Menace" system rewards you for acting as Spider-Man by stopping crime and saving citizens, but face the consequences if you don’t keep down crime rates. Advanced Combat & Upgrades: New abilities and expanded fast-paced, acrobatic combat moves bring players up close and personal as Spidey takes down foes. AH4QPSS57HAQPRDQ54AHOQGC24JQ.product_description: Feel the beat in Dedede’s Drum Dash View larger Pink? Check. Puffy? Check. Powerful? You have no idea. Devour trees, obstacles, and huge chunks of stages with Kirby’s Hypernova ability and inhale enemies to copy epic new moves like Archer. It’s a grand new Kirby adventure PLUS a new multiplayer battle mode, Kirby Fighters!* When a mysterious being kidnaps King Dedede atop a giant Dreamstalk, only Kirby can save the day! Jump from the foreground to the background in dynamic 3D side-scrolling environments while using new and returning copy abilities to defeat enemies. Duke it out in Kirby Fighters, a fierce 4-player* battle mode where you fight using a chosen ability like Sword or Ninja. The last Kirby standing reigns supreme. Whether you’re new to Kirby or an old fan, the Kirby: Triple Deluxe game offers a triple threat—action, adventure, and a battle mode. AHNSZCP3JIOZZVYXFJRGQEKRSTFA.product_description: The Officially Licensed system backpack Switch Elite Edition holds and protects the Nintendo Switch Console and has additional spacious pockets for the Pro Controller, AC adapter, Switch game cards, a 15” laptop and additional personal items for the gamer on the go. He loves it.  It works so well.  It is also a great color, with black accents in the front.  It is a great bag to carry all his electronics in it. it also came with a guide to show what goes where in the bag.  very nice.  I am very happy with it.  It is made well and will last a long time.

AHNSZCP3JIOZZVYXFJRGQEKRSTFA.product_description: The THRUSTMASTER TH8A Add-On Gearbox Shifter for PC, PS3, PS4 and Xbox One adds realism and authenticity to your racing experience. It offers realistic gear-shifting feel with its detachable knob. The gear stick is compatible with real universal (automotive) knobs available at car parts stores and big-box retailers, and the two included shift-plates offer your choice of "H"-pattern (7+1) and Sequential (+/-) shifting. The internal mechanism features 100% metal construction with a metal gear stick and clamping system. H.E.A.R.T. “Hall Effect AccuRate Technology” offers precision that won't decrease over time (with its contactless magnetic sensor). There is no tact switch and no potentiometer to wear out (allowing for unlimited product lifespan). The firmware is upgradable, and the internal memory offers adjustable gearshift travel to suit your driving style (software available for download on PC). There is an adjustable resistance when shifting gears and the shift-plate position and rotation is adjustable by 360 degrees. The clamping system position and rotation are also adjustable by 360 degrees. The clamp is optimized for any support surface, including tables or shelves from 1 to 55 mm in thickness (0.04” to 2.17”). The built-in screw threads and removable clamping system allow for cockpit mounting. For PC use, the TH8A Add-On Gearbox Shifter works with all racing wheels on the market. With the PS3 and PS4, the gearbox works with the T500RS, Ferrari F1 Wheel Integral T500, T300RS, and T300 Ferrari GTE racing wheels. On Xbox One, it works with the TX Racing Wheel. Add excitement and realism to your racing experience with the THRUSTMASTER TH8A Add-On Gearbox Shifter for PC, PS3, PS4 and Xbox One.
AHNSZCP3JIOZZVYXFJRGQEKRSTFA.review_text: My son loves this thing, he uses it on driving games to drift and has so much fun doing it.  this thing is expensive, but has brought him a lot of joy.  He uses it a lot.  It is made very well, very sturdy.  He has a set up in his room for the driving stuff and this was a nice addition to it.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AH3CWNIKPJVRG2P5X46UIIVDRDYA.product_description: Begin your adventure in the Galar region and discover newly-added areas, the Isle of armor and the Crown tundra, with the Pokemon shield + Pokemon shield expansion Pass! This bundle includes both the base Pokemon sword game and the Pokemon shield expansion Pass, which gives you access to two new areas, newly discovered Pokemon, and stories of growth and exploration! Begin your adventure as a Pokemon Trainer by choosing One of three partner Pokemon: Grookey, Scorbunny, or Sobble. Then embark on a journey in the Galar region, where you'll challenge the troublemakers of team yell, while unraveling the mystery behind the legendary Pokemon zacian and zamazenta! Explore the wild area, a vast expanse of land where the player can freely control the Camera. Team up with three other players locally or online in the multiplayer co-op Max raid battles in which players will face off against gigantic and super-strong Pokemon known as dynamax Pokemon. Continue your Pokemon shield adventure in the Isle of armor and the Crown tundra, two new areas to explore that will be added to the Galar region as part of the Pokemon shield expansion Pass! Each area offers a different adventure, where you'll be able to visit the Far reaches of the Galar region and meet the people and Pokemon that live there. You'll also see some familiar Pokemon that didn't appear in the Galar region before. Keep the adventure going with your existing Pokemon shield save Data and jump into this expansion to Pokemon shield!
AH3CWNIKPJVRG2P5X46UIIVDRDYA.review_text: It's worth it.  Very nice game and a must have for Pokemon fans.

AH3CWNIKPJVRG2P5X46UIIVDRDYA.product_description: The Hero from the DRAGON QUEST XI game joins Super Smash Bros. Ultimate as a playable fighter! Wielding the Supreme Sword of Light and a trusty shield, he can slice his foes and block incoming attacks. When Hero pulls up his Command Selection screen, he'll have access to a random selection of spells that could turn the tide of battle in his favor! This pack also includes the Yggdrasil's Altar stage, which sweeps across nearby areas around the sacred Tree of Life, as well as a selection of music from the DRAGON QUEST series. Challenger Pack 2 includes Hero as a playable fighter, his stage, Yggdrasil's Altar, and a selection of music from the DRAGON QUEST series. Note: The content of this Challenger Pack is already included in the Super Smash Bros. Ultimate Fighters Pass (sold separately). • Hero joins the battle as a playable fighter! • Challenger Pack 2 also includes the Yggdrasil’s Altar stage, and DRAGON QUEST series music tracks 2018 Nintendo Original Game: Nintendo / HAL Laboratory, Inc. Characters: Nintendo / HAL Laboratory, Inc. / Pokémon. / Creatures Inc. / GAME FREAK inc. / SHIGESATO ITOI / APE inc. / INTELLIGENT SYSTEMS / Konami Digital Entertainment / SEGA / CAPCOM CO., LTD. / BANDAI NAMCO Entertainment Inc. / MONOLITHSOFT / CAPCOM U.S.A., INC. / SQUARE ENIX CO., LTD. / ATLUS / Microsoft. Super Smash Bros. and Nintendo Switch are trademarks of Nintendo. 2019 Nintendo. Full version of game required to use DLC. Sold separately.The Challenger Pack may require additional storage. Nintendo Switch storage can be expanded with a microSD card if needed (sold separately).​ Nintendo Play account required to download and install.
AH3CWNIKPJVRG2P5X46UIIVDRDYA.review_text: Bright, colorful and full of excitement.  It's a good buy and i have to admit, I play it too.

AHACKSFWUR3M3Q4B6VO5QIUZQFAQ.product_description: *This Is An Open and Shut Case - Of Epic Gaming Protection Proportions* - Built in Mesh Pouch Securely Cradles Your Device for Carrying Confidence - The strong elastic band sewn into the mesh carrying pouch can comfortably hold any one of the following DS systems including the NEW 3DS XL, NEW 3DS, 3DS XL, 3DSLL, 3DS, DSiXL, DSiLL, DSi, DS Lite, or DS. Main Features - Stores up to 8 DS/3DS game cartridges, more slots than any other case its size class - Surrounded with a hard, sturdy, synthetic, nylon material that easily shields your console from daily wear - Lined with a soft micro fiber interior that won't scratch your system - Adjustable and fully detachable shoulder strap allowing fashion-forward versatility; wear it as a clutch, wristlet, shoulder, or crossbody bag - Lightweight design won't slow down your traveling gaming adventures Additional Included Features - Second mesh accessory pouch for carrying small items (not designed to fit the standard DS wall charger and DS system at the same time) - Elastic loop for carrying an extra stylus (extra stylus not included) - The only 3DS case backed by lifetime, hassle-free, replacement Click the Add to Cart Button at the Top of the Page to Protect Your 3DS System Now!
AHACKSFWUR3M3Q4B6VO5QIUZQFAQ.review_text: This was purchased for my 9 year old daughter to carry her new Nintendo 3DS XL. She uses it all the time for her DS. It holds 8 games, has slots for the styluses (styli?) and the adjustable carrying strap makes it easy to take along anywhere. It also has two compartments, one for the DS and one for the charger. Everything fits well and in it's own place. She wears it crossbody and over her shoulder like a little purse.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AHACKSFWUR3M3Q4B6VO5QIUZQFAQ.product_description: Product Description Old-School Platforming Fun - Jump, bounce and power-up through visually stunning side-scrolling worlds filled with Mushroom Kingdom madness. New Action - Grab a Mega Mushroom and grow to incredible proportions, or smash through your foes in a blue Koopa shell. 2 Distinct Multiplayer Modes - New Super Mario Bros. features competitive 2-player multiplayer and mini-game functionality supporting up to 4 players. A Classic Storyline - Bowser and Bowser Jr. have kidnapped Princess Peach, again, and only Mario and you can save her. Powerups Galore - You'll find classic power-ups, like the Super Mushroom and the Fire Flower in the game, as well as some all-new ones that let Mario explore the Mushroom Kingdom like never before. New Moves - New Super Mario Bros. expands Mario's arsenal of moves to include some very powerful advanced techniques. If you want to uncover every secret in the game, you'll have to master them all. Amazon.com Twenty years after Nintendo's biggest franchise was born, the Mario Bros. return in a dazzling, all-new platformer sure to set players' fingers twitching. In New Super Mario Bros. for DS, fans from Mario's classic days will see their dreams answered in this return to the Mushroom Kingdom, while a new generation of Mario players will learn what true platforming greatness means. The game contains 80 levels of side-scrolling fun across 8 worlds and features multiplayer support both in wireless DS single-card download play and wireless DS multi-card play. .caption { font-family: Verdana, Helvetica neue, Arial, serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: bold; font-style: italic; } ul.indent { list-style: inside disc; text-indent: -15px; } table.callout { font-family: verdana; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1. 3em; } td.vgoverview { height: 125px; background: #9DC4D8 url(https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/G/01/electronics/detail-page/callout-bg.png) repeat-x; border-left: 1px solid #999999; border-right: 1px solid #999999; padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px; padding-bottom: 10px; width: 250px; font-family: verdana; font-size: 12px; } Loads of fun powerups. View larger . Easy to follow 8 gameworld map. View larger . Boss battles against familiar foes. View larger . Story The storyline of New Super Mario Bros. is simple, but 100% classic Mario Bros. During a tranquil walk with Princess Peach, Mario witness a lightning strike on Peach's castle. Mario predictably races off to lend a hand, but no sooner has he stepped away from the always popular Peach, than he sees Bowser Jr. step into the picture and drag her away. As mario pursues them throughout both overworld and underworld, the appearance of Bowser and the Koopas shows that the list of fiends opposing him is longer than he expected. But Mario is not one to be put off by such things. Come along with Mario, Luigi and other friends as they venture into the depths of the Mushroom Kingdom to get Peach back once again. Gameplay Although New Super Mario Bros. is a modern addition to the Mario Bros. tome, it revels in the fact that it is an old school side-scrolling platformer through and through. The single player mode is set on 80 levels spread across eight worlds, with players assuming the role of either Mario or Luigi. As in all Mario Bros. games, the ultimate goal is to rescue Peach, but as players traverse game levels the immediate goal is to collect coins, hop on top of enemies, and break open blocks while searching for power-ups as you race to capture the flag at the end of each level. Each of the game's eight worlds climaxes with a boss battle tied into the abduction of Peach, in which players will need to utilize the game's six power-ups in order to have success. Along with its single player mode New Super Mario Bros. for DS also features two different multiplayer modes. The first is the Mario vs. Luigi, 2-player competitive mode. Here it's brother vs. brother in a literal race for Stars. Players choose to play as either Mario or Luigi, with the goal to collect the Stars that appear throughout the stage at timed intervals. If one brother gets a star(s) first they can be stolen away by the other player by doing damage. The one who gets to the set number of stars wins. This mode uses local wireless DS Single-Card download play, so only one game card is needed. The other multiplayer mode revolves around mini-game play. There are variety of these, which can be engaged in on a one-on-one basis, or in tournament fashion with 2-4 players. The Power-ups. New Super Mario for DS contains contains six power-up options. Three of these, the Super Mushroom, the Fire Flower and the Starman are back from previous games. There are also three entirely new to the game, these being: the Blue Koopa Shell, which Mario can crawl into to protect himself and spin when inside it to attack enemies; the Mega Mushroom, which allows for a huge Mario; and the Mini-Mushroom, which makes Mario very small and able to get into places that wouldn't otherwise be available. Key Game Features Old-School Platforming Fun - Jump, bounce and power-up through visually stunning side-scrolling worlds filled with Mushroom Kingdom madness. Old-School Platforming Fun - Jump, bounce and power-up through visually stunning side-scrolling worlds filled with Mushroom Kingdom madness. New Action - Grab a Mega Mushroom and grow to incredible proportions, or smash through your foes in a blue Koopa shell. New Action - Grab a Mega Mushroom and grow to incredible proportions, or smash through your foes in a blue Koopa shell. 2 Distinct Multiplayer Modes - New Super Mario Bros. features competitive 2-player multiplayer and mini-game functionality supporting up to 4 players. 2 Distinct Multiplayer Modes - New Super Mario Bros. features competitive 2-player multiplayer and mini-game functionality supporting up to 4 players. A Classic Storyline - Bowser and Bowser Jr. have kidnapped Princess Peach, again, and only Mario and you can save her. A Classic Storyline - Bowser and Bowser Jr. have kidnapped Princess Peach, again, and only Mario and you can save her. Powerups Galore - You'll find classic power-ups, like the Super Mushroom and the Fire Flower in the game, as well as some all-new ones that let Mario explore the Mushroom Kingdom like never before. New Moves - New Super Mario Bros. expands Mario's arsenal of moves to include some very powerful advanced techniques. If you want to uncover every secret in the game, you'll have to master them all. AHACKSFWUR3M3Q4B6VO5QIUZQFAQ.review_text: This game is primarily played by my 6 year old. He enjoys it and finds it challenging but fun. You have to help Mario rescue the princess from the evil turtle, Bowser. He's never made it all the way through the game yet, but he may be a bit younger than the age group Nintendo was aiming for. Give him time! He said he did kill Bowser once, and for that he is quite proud, but he came back to life.

AHACKSFWUR3M3Q4B6VO5QIUZQFAQ.product_description: In a scenario drawn from the film, The LEGO Movie Videogame puts LEGO kids into the role of Emmet, an ordinary, rules-following, perfectly average LEGO minifigure who is mistakenly identified as the most extraordinary person and the key to saving the world. Players guide him as he is drafted into a fellowship of strangers on an epic quest to stop an evil tyrant, a journey for which Emmet is hopelessly and hilariously underprepared.
AHACKSFWUR3M3Q4B6VO5QIUZQFAQ.review_text:
This game is primarily played by my 9 year old daughter. Though it's rated "E", the manufacturer's target age seems to be 12-14.

This Lego Movie video game features characters from the movie, Emmet, who is an "every man" and he is suddenly thrust into the role of an unlikely hero. He tries to save the world from an evil character who uses a robot to terrorize the city.

AHACKSFWUR3M3Q4B6VO5QIUZQFAQ.product_description: In this humorous epilogue to the motion picture, Disney Frozen: Olaf's Quest hands center spotlight to Olaf, the outgoing, innocent and comically carefree snowman from Disney's epic comedy adventure. It pairs tightly tuned platforming action with light puzzle-solving elements across 60 imaginative levels, complete with hidden collectibles, side challenges and unlockable customization items. Frozen's gameplay mechanics are informed by Olaf's unique design, allowing him to use his own frigid yet fluid form to help him out of slippery situations. The game is designed with challenges appropriate for young or new gamers.
AHACKSFWUR3M3Q4B6VO5QIUZQFAQ.review_text:
Poor Olaf, he just doesn't get as much love in this house. Not exactly their favorite game, they say "it's just ok".

Olaf gets stuck in a snow blizzard and he can't find Anna. You are supposed to help him along the way. Don't get stuck, too, or you'll lose Olaf!
